overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a dirt trail through a mountainous forest landscape. The journey transitions from a dense pine forest to an open valley vista, including a brief encounter with a horse rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through tall pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the dense pine forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with patches of grass
grass-covered slope rising up from the left side of the trail
rocky terrain with loose stones on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense pine forest. Tall evergreen trees line both sides of the path, partially obscuring the sky, while grassy hillsides and rocky slopes flank the immediate edges of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley overlook with scattered boulders

events.description: exiting dense forest into open mountain valley with expansive vista of distant mountains
horse rider passes by on the right, traveling in the opposite direction down the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal the valley vista ahead

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing from right to left, moving downhill along the trail

entered.detail: expansive view of the mountain valley opening up ahead with rolling terrain
mountain range visible in the distance under partly cloudy skies
large gray boulders scattered along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide mountain valley with full sky visibility and expansive views of distant peaks. The character continues walking as the dense forest gives way to scattered boulders and open terrain. A horse rider passes by on the right, traveling downhill in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley floor with large outcroppings

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open valley surrounded by rock formations and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: massive rock formation with layered stone on the left side of the trail
large boulders and rock piles on the right side of the path
small campsite with tents visible on the left side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open valley floor characterized by large rock outcroppings on both sides and sparse vegetation. A small campsite appears in the distance on the left. The trail continues toward the center of the valley as the surrounding terrain becomes more rocky and arid.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic pine forest into a vast, open mountain valley. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by tall evergreen trees and rocky slopes that partially obscure the sky. As the path opens up, the dense forest gives way to expansive views of distant peaks and scattered boulders, while a horse rider passes by on the right traveling in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts across the valley floor, moving past large rock outcroppings and sparse vegetation toward a small campsite visible in the distance. Finally, the trail leads deeper into the center of the valley as the surrounding terrain becomes increasingly rocky and arid.
